title: Intensely Buttery Greek Lamb Skewers
description: A jammy and chewy Greek dish featuring lamb skewers with a rich buttery flavor, achieved through a wok-hei cooking technique, perfect for meal prep and dash-friendly cooking
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat, aiming for a temperature of 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, black pepper, and oregano
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Grill the lamb skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are cooked through and slightly charred
While the lamb is cooking, melt the butter in a small saucepan over low heat
Once the lamb is done, brush the melted butter over the skewers, making sure they are fully coated
Serve the intensely buttery Greek lamb skewers hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired
